content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 18, 2001

Heather C. McLaughlin, City Attorney
City of Benicia
City Hall
250 East L Street
Benicia, CA 94510

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 01-095

Dear Ms. McLaughlin:

Having received no further response from you since my letter dated August 15, 2001, this letter is to inform that your request for advice is hereby considered withdrawn and the file has been closed.

If you have any other questions or if I can be of further assistance regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature]

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Heather C. McLaughlin, City Attorney of Benicia. It informs her that their request for advice has been withdrawn and the file has been closed since no further response was received after August 15, 2001. The letter also states that if Ms. McLaughlin has any other questions or needs further assistance, she should contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.
